name: Buttermilk Wheat Loaf for the Zojirushi
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the buttermilk, butter, sugar, salt, bread flour, and wheat flour into a mixing bowl.
2. Tap the container firmly to level out ingredients.
3. Sprinkle the yeast in the center of the mixture.
4. Place the bowl securely in the baking unit and close the lid.
5. Select the BASIC WHITE BREAD setting on the machine.
6. Press START.
7. The COMPLETE light will flash when bread is done.
8. Using hotpads, remove the bowl from the unit and pull out the kneading rod.
9. Turn the dough out onto a cooling rack and cool before slicing.
10. Makes 1 loaf.
